2.1.0: Fixed MFA redirect loop issue for password-based users
Added Google 2-Step Verification instructions for OAuth users
Enhanced MFA flow with proper session handling and navigation
Improved MFA verification UX with inline and modal options
2.0.2: Migrated security headers to Cloudflare Transform Rules for optimal edge performance
Removed security headers from vercel.json (now managed in Cloudflare)
Updated documentation with Cloudflare cache troubleshooting
2.0.1: Added comprehensive security response headers (HSTS, X-Frame-Options, CSP, etc.)
Fixed Google OAuth users blocked from password reset attempts
Fixed TypeScript errors in SecurityDashboard component
Enhanced auto-redirect to login after password reset with email pre-fill
Enhanced UX with countdown timers in forgot password flow
Fixed React hooks initialization issue in App component
2.0.0: Production authentication system v2 with enhanced security
Comprehensive rate limiting and DDoS protection
